title.en: Treatment of non-volatile erasable and electrically erasable programmable read-only memory media following sanitisation

group-parts.group: Treatment of non-volatile erasable and electrically erasable programmable read-only memory media following sanitisation
group-parts.name: overview

prose.en: As little research has been conducted into the recovery of data from non-volatile EPROM and EEPROM media, SECRET and TOP SECRET EPROM and EEPROM media retains its classification following sanitisation.
